name: Sonova Holding AG
description: Sonova is the global leader in innovative hearing care solutions, combining technology leadership, audiological expertise, and a strong local presence to serve people with hearing loss in more than 100 countries. Headquartered in Stäfa, Switzerland, the company operates as a vertically integrated business across its Wholesale, Retail, and Cochlear Implants segments. Through renowned brands such as Phonak, Unitron, and Advanced Bionics, Sonova provides a comprehensive range of hearing instruments and cochlear implants, driven by a commitment to customer-focused innovation and the vision of a world where everyone enjoys the delight of hearing.
